title: psoralea parviflora
intro: Psoralea parviflora, also known as smallflower wolf's bane, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psoralea parviflora include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to prevent cancer and improve skin health. Herbal preparations of Psoralea parviflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
